title: RESPONSE definition in American English | Collins English Dictionary
snippet: Your response to an event or to something that is said is your reply or reaction to it. In response to my question, he lifted his head and thought for a moment.

title: Response - Definition, Meaning & Synonyms | Vocabulary.com
